Title: Create new order
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Navigate to Orders module
2. Click 'Add' or create new order
3. Fill in order details (customer, store, items)
4. Click 'Create'
5. Verify order in list
Expected Result: New order is displayed on Customer orders blade with correct details

Title: View and edit order details
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Order exists [ORD-001]
Steps:
1. Navigate to Orders module
2. Select and click on existing order
3. Verify order details blade opens in editable format
4. Change any fields
5. Click 'Save'
6. Reopen blade with Order details
Expected Result:
1. Order details blade displays all fields in editable format
2. Changes saved and persisted

Title: Enable/Disable order index setting
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Open Settings > Orders
2. Disable 'Order Index' > Save
3. Open order > Verify Index widget hidden
4. Enable 'Order Index' > Save
5. Open order > Verify Index widget shown
Expected Result: Disabled: Index widget hidden. Enabled: Index widget shown and user can index orders.

Title: Number template with datetime {0}

2. Set template: {0}

4. Verify order number
Expected Result: Order number created with datetime UTC data

Title: Number template with sequential {1} and padded CO{1:D5}
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Set template: {1} > Create two orders > Verify sequential numbers (1, 2)
2. Set template: CO{1:D5} > Create two orders > Verify padded numbers (CO00001, CO00002)
Expected Result: Orders have sequential numbers. Padded format works correctly.

Title: Number template with date+padded and weekly reset
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Set template: CO-{0:yyMMdd}-{1:D5} > Create orders > Verify format
2. Set template: PO{0:yyMMdd}-{1:D5}@Weekly:1:10 > Create orders > Verify weekly reset
Expected Result:
1. Format: CO-240131-00001, CO-240131-00002
2. Weekly reset: counter resets after 1 week starting from 10
